input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement living descriptions with append-only timeline for projects, features, and tasks

Adds an append-only description_entries array to project, feature, and task entities
that tracks how descriptions evolve over time. Each entry records the text, reasoning,
triggering entities, and timestamp. When multiple entries exist, an LLM synthesizes
them into a coherent description field.

- Schema: description_entries array with nested fields on project/feature/task tables
- Backend: descriptions module (types, generate, persist, triggers, queries)
- Triggers: decision_confirmed and task_completed events cascade description updates
  to related projects/features/tasks via graph traversal
- Seeding: initial entries created at extraction time and work-item acceptance
- UI: DescriptionSection component with expandable timeline history
- Tests: smoke tests for extraction seeding, work-item seeding, and decision propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
